creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #16)

Hi Dan! 

First, apologies for being non-responsive on this, I have been recovering from a health issue over the past few years.

What is the best way I can help here? I'm happy to review patches or just get out of the way officially, whatever is needed. Just let me know.

Thanks to everyone for working on this in spite of my absence, I am sure I'm not the only one who appreciates it.

Thanks,
Danny Warren
